title: orthosia misera
intro: Orthosia misera, also known as the Poor Man's Coffee or Green Winterberry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orthosia misera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the dried plant material in capsules or tinctures.
